ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I find it easy to manipulate people OR B) I don't like it when I find myself manipulating people.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) When people compliment me I get embarrassed OR B) I know that I am a good person because everybody keeps telling me so.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I like having authority over other people OR B) I don't mind following orders.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I insist upon getting the respect that is due to me OR B) I usually get the respect I deserve.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I don't particularly like to show off my body OR B) I like to show off my body.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I have a strong will to power OR B) Power for its own sake doesn't interest me.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I expect a great deal from other people OR B) I like to do things for other people.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) My body is nothing special OR B) I like to look at my body.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) Being in authority doesn't mean much to me OR B) People always recognize my authority.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I will never be satisfied until l will get all that I deserve OR B) I will take my satisfactions as they come.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I try not to be a show off OR B) I will usually show off if I get the chance.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I am a born leader OR B) Leadership is a quality that takes a long time to develop.
Choose the one that you MOST AGREE with: A) I like to look at myself in the mirror OR B) I am not particularly interested in looking at myself in the mirror.
Leadership/Authority Subscale score
Notes: Sum of items q3_npi13, q6_npi13, q9_npi13, q12_npi13

ElementDescription: Grandiose/Exhibitionism Subscale score
Notes: Sum of items q2_npi13, q5_npi13, q8_npi13, q11_npi13, q13_npi13

ElementDescription: Entitlement/Exploitativeness Subscale score
Notes: Sum of items q1_npi13, q4_npi13, q7_npi13, q10_npi13

ElementDescription: Total Score Narcissistic Personality Inventory (NPI-13)
Notes: Sum of all items q1_npi13 to q13_npi13
